name: OpenBuild
fullText:
We’re releasing our free open-source course <OpenClaw 101: From Beginner to Advanced> 🦞

Course Outline:
1. OpenClaw 101: Installation & Optimization
2. Advanced Usage & Security Best Practices
3. 4 Real Case Studies (Hands-on)

Beginner-friendly even if you're just getting https://t.co/YK8JK5k1kV

name: OpenBuild
fullText:
Stop worrying about AI taking your job. Start using AI to build on-chain.

We're going live with @themetalboyrick & @gianmalarcon — two devs actually shipping on Starknet — to talk about what that looks like in practice.📅 Mar 31 · 19:00 CST 

🎙️ Starknet Basecamp 2026 kickoff https://t.co/mTYF1cD2LX
